title: elaphoglossum alpestre
intro: Elaphoglossum alpestre, a species of epiphytic fern, is a type of plant that grows in the wild, particularly in mountainous regions. The medicinal properties of Elaphoglossum alpestre include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. This plant is also said to have various health benefits, including aiding in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, Elaphoglossum alpestre is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used as a topical application to promote wound healing.
